commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: In those days the multitude being very great, and having nothing to eat, Jesus called his disciples unto him, and said unto them, Cornelius a Lapide Christ feedeth the people miraculously: 10 refuses to give a sign to the Pharisees: 14admonisheth his disciples to beware of the leaven of the Pharisees, and of the leaven of Herod: 22giveth a blind man his sight: 27 acknowledgeth that he is the Christ, who should suffer and rise again: 34and exhorteth to patience in persecution for the profession of the gospel.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
